message:
fix(fr-command): align SINTERCARD error wording with upstream (br-frankenredis-ozj0)

Upstream t_set.c emits:
  - "numkeys should be greater than 0" (was "can't be non-positive value")
  - "Number of keys can't be greater than number of args"
    (was "ERR syntax error" from the generic fallback)
  - "LIMIT can't be negative" on both parse-failure and negative value
    (was "ERR value is not an integer or out of range" when LIMIT=abc
    because parse_i64_arg's error bubbled up first)

Updates the 5 fixture cases in core_set.json that had captured the
old wording. Verified via live_redis_core_set_matches_runtime: 162/162
pass vs vendored redis-server (was 157/162).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
